item.title: Acer America Corporation Recalls Two-Wheeled Folding Electric Due to Risk of Injury from Fall Hazard
item.company: Online at Acer.com, Amazon.com and in stores at BrandMart from between June 2023 and February 2026 for between $245 and $70.
item.brand: Online at Acer.com, Amazon.com and in stores at BrandMart from between June 2023 and February 2026 for between $245 and $70.
item.product: Acer AES015 Two-Wheeled Folding Electric Scooters
item.summary: This recall involves the Acer AES015 two-wheeled folding electric scooters. The scooters are designed to allow the user to fold the front tube down to the platform for compact transport and storage. They were sold in black with a green and white decal on the front tube and the sides of the platform, and the wheels have a green circle around the rim. The model number AES015 is located on the label on the front tube.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Acer AES015 Two-Wheeled Folding Electric Scooters.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled folding electric scooter immediately and contact Acer at https://www.acer.com/us-en/support/alerts-recalls for instructions on how to tighten the screw. Free repair tools will be available to consumers upon request.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
